body:
Fixes #1814

## Summary
- Add `lino-i18n` as a dependency and route translation file loading/runtime lookup through it while keeping Hive Mind's existing i18n wrapper API.
- Convert locale catalogues to nested `.lino` blocks and triple-quoted multiline strings where the key shape allows it, while keeping parent-label families flat to preserve existing keys.
- Add regression coverage for nested keys, multiline values, and locale key parity; refresh the i18n example script.
- Add issue research, raw data, solution notes, and verification logs under `docs/case-studies/issue-1814`.

## Reproduction
- `docs/case-studies/issue-1814/test-logs/before-fix-i18n.log` captures the custom loader failing after nested/multiline locale conversion.
- `docs/case-studies/issue-1814/test-logs/after-fix-i18n.log` captures the fixed `lino-i18n` path.

## Tests
- `node tests/test-i18n.mjs`
- `for test in tests/test-i18n.mjs tests/test-telegram-ui-i18n.mjs tests/test-version-info.mjs tests/limits-display.test.mjs tests/telegram-show-limits.test.mjs tests/test-queue-display-1267.mjs tests/test-solve-queue-command.mjs; do node "$test" || exit $?; done`
- `node examples/test-i18n.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `node tests/docs-validation.mjs`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (warnings only for pre-existing near-limit files)
- `npm test` (`All 212 selected test file(s) passed.`)

## Notes
- Local install emitted Node engine warnings because the local shell used Node v20.20.2 while this repository and `lino-i18n` declare Node >=24; local checks still passed.
- No upstream `lino-i18n` issue was opened because the library covered the needed loader/runtime support.

title: Use lino-i18n for translation loading
